Space Chase is a Game about thriving in space, and biuld a colony

SPACE CHASE

date: 06/16/2026 author: Thadeu Moscatelli city: Votorantim - SP - Brazil

  1. Introduction

    • Brainstorm

    • ship game.
    • infinity random gameplay.
    • 3D with pixel art textures(low resolution)

    • …

    • High Concept

      Earth has been destroyed, you live in a colony ship, and is the main commander of the special forces, responsable for exploring the universe around the ship, searching for resources, itens and protection the ship, while developing new technology and leaving the colonies with a the best life possible.

  • Demography

    • Audiency: 25-30 years.
    • Game style: Ships
    • Plataform: Mobile / PC
